4 Awards from BAGEP to KHAS Young Scientists

The Academy of Science Young Scientists Award Program (BAGEP), which is carried out entirely with the support of civil society and donations from individuals and institutions without public funding, rewards promising young academics with a prestigious scholarship to support their research. Within the scope of the BAGEP Award, young scientists receive a support of 20,000 TL per year for two years.

Since 2013, the young scientists who are entitled to receive incentives for 2021 in the award program have been determined. Four young academics from Kadir Has University were recognized among the brightest scientists in their fields.

Our award-winning academicians and their departments are as follows:(*)

– Prof. Dr. Deniz EROĞLU, Molecular Biology and Genetics

– Prof. Dr. Emre Ozan POLAT, Mechatronics Engineering

– Assoc. Prof. Dr. H. Akın ÜNVER, International Relations

– Assoc. Prof. Onurcan YILMAZ, Psychology

Thanks to our academics who were entitled to receive support within the scope of BAGEP 2021, Kadir Has University ranked third among the universities with the highest number of BAGEP Awards.

We congratulate our young academics for their outstanding achievements.

(*) The list is sorted by last name.

For details of the Academy of Science Young Scientists Award Program: https://bilimakademisi.org/
